content: *반지, 전설 (조율 필요)* --- 이 반지를 착용한 동안에는 [마법](/1def7f5a1e8081d69aa0f579a00ee48b?pvs=25) 행동을 사용해 자신을 [투명](/1def7f5a1e80819b8679edcccaa3b420?pvs=25) 상태로 만들 수 있습니다. 반지를 벗거나 보조 행동으로 모습을 드러내기 전까지 이 효과가 지속됩니다. --- ![](https://prod-files-secure.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/8dffc202-0f6e-4adf-b208-fc378f0d8bf3/8730d60c-5268-41c5-b496-2275613e3064/638657413944587527.png?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Content-Sha256=UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD&X-Amz-Credential=ASIAZI2LB466X76Q6I5B%2F20260616%2Fus-west-2%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20260616T093515Z&X-Amz-Expires=3600&X-Amz-Security-Token=IQoJb3JpZ2luX2VjEKf%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2FwEaCXVzLXdlc3QtMiJHMEUCIE21llf%2BvZJUfjsqYpzO2RyD4Xh7q%2BZDule9V5GnmYIBAiEA7Mh9t7bnCC2NNnQmeJnPIn1VcLbmFf4MNt%2FbEdmmyikq%2FwMIcBAAGgw2Mzc0MjMxODM4MDUiDLw8%2B83UvEt15Yhd5yrcA0j3xNC3qCtElKgQYN57zIpGSbhdvksEfM3r4kCgBFwKJGd4ngVEHB%2FwJnjIY3CYhoerqYK3QKUIHETzgTdD16oOcwDbcb%2BWTtjLMcLAzhbRE7eVmvrYWJVDYfaTTBVdQaxdh1%2Br5BzLuUWXw0KgqYZ3vvue7uATVBbuLV%2FWx4cMQajGQDzyhfxgNZdlhuuw7FEBle69dPXEOzMLB%2Fx1NFctH1XYC1cpVRK1cXAwJHq6E%2FolaelFgOhfjcvlTX4eABg2Qznq1c%2Fi96tsZkhoT7dhmu6j3fW%2B%2BjlNAXHXYSH70Ytrq91MbFNfNC1w4wSDSGR7AbyRo7tPp25RwiQUYrJdQg%2FdtswgL3HrWyI8KW6KTQ0dLU%2F8sjz84Gqi2V5Y0SHjK7VN%2FBdx5d7Cati7FFv5U9Xm1QpblBiTD6zotSx%2FOuI6bOLcVSYLpjXliXAVgJSz5r2gXBQX5x6zOtLIz5jS1qlYzgEBCq6O57%2ByrUXVFoNbpcZ6RfcKS9Eb9fNNxTIF3sB8shly4yXEhvdfalpJOuKIoiyAkU1ivdXAiAFUmytkaTOELXaBGsZEYP4ASKNbM3M%2BjOJWGvQanhjAtXXcoKamPTXY34tuE7VcZJDnSE%2Bx%2B6%2BL7eoPzxiwMKzaw9EGOqUBj6wdQj0zhbs2Cgc888hnkbRmRYAOYgCVZvawAtsaW8d%2B2zKHKSAD3avPzi1ijeqrd%2FqxhXENMiPnUrWEwfY6IMeHnd0DMszNoWqJlNF6FPqonXGlF%2BmpwBbU1buHYZUfOWeCcvdirp7b0Gx5FQVKTxwbRJbkAe5oSEZwIfms7113AO3GBUdR5yGujIk%2BwEQfgEsyykxKOFadG%2BA8gX91zgdM4%2BiM&X-Amz-Signature=08a75bbcb035b307a8dc1b1fffee7e01faee9779c7f0b1609b39059e150d817d&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&x-amz-checksum-mode=ENABLED&x-id=GetObject)
